Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestFactoryTranslation

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestFactoryTranslation
public class TestFactoryTranslation extends AbstractTests
Acceptance tests for factory translation. We first test factory translation on arbitrary formulas. Then, we test exhaustively all operators.

    private static void
    assertNoTranslation(FormulaFactory to, Formula<?> f)
    Verifies that a formula which cannot be translated is properly handled.
    private static void
    assertSameTranslation(Formula<?> f)
    Verifies that the same formula is returned if there is no need to translate anything.
    private static void
    assertTranslation(Formula<?> f)
    Verifies that formula translation to ff_extns fulfills its specification.

    Verifies that formula translation to a given factory fulfills its specification.

    Verifies formula translation between two factories on an arbitrary formula.

    testCompatibleTranslationOnBoundIdDeclName()
    Compatible translation of a bound identifier declaration, even if its name becomes reserved.
    void

    Compatible translation on a node from a factory with extensions to a factory with a subset of these extensions

    Compatible translation on a node from a factory with extensions to a factory with a superset of these extensions

    Incompatible translation due to non-translatable type of an empty set extension.

  • Method Details

    • assertTranslation

      private static void assertTranslation(FormulaFactory from, FormulaFactory to)
      Verifies formula translation between two factories on an arbitrary formula.

    • assertTranslation

      private static void assertTranslation(Formula<?> f)
      Verifies that formula translation to ff_extns fulfills its specification.

    • assertTranslation

      private static void assertTranslation(FormulaFactory to, Formula<?> f)
      Verifies that formula translation to a given factory fulfills its specification.

    • assertNoTranslation

      private static void assertNoTranslation(FormulaFactory to, Formula<?> f)
      Verifies that a formula which cannot be translated is properly handled.

    • assertSameTranslation

      private static void assertSameTranslation(Formula<?> f)
      Verifies that the same formula is returned if there is no need to translate anything.

    • testCompatibleTranslationToSubSet

      public void testCompatibleTranslationToSubSet()
      Compatible translation on a node from a factory with extensions to a factory with a subset of these extensions

    • testCompatibleTranslationToSuperSet

      public void testCompatibleTranslationToSuperSet()
      Compatible translation on a node from a factory with extensions to a factory with a superset of these extensions

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnExpressionExtension

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnExpressionExtension()
      Incompatible translation to a factory with an incompatible extension subset. We test the root of the formula AST, and some interior node.

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnPredicateExtension

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnPredicateExtension()
      Incompatible translation to a factory with an incompatible extension subset. We test the root of the formula AST, and some interior node.

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnIdName

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnIdName()
      Incompatible translation to a factory with an incompatible free identifier name.

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnFreeIdTypeName

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnFreeIdTypeName()
      Incompatible translation due to given set on free identifier.

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnFreeIdTypeExt

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnFreeIdTypeExt()
      Incompatible translation due to unsupported formula extension in type of a free identifier.

    • testCompatibleTranslationOnBoundIdDeclName

      public void testCompatibleTranslationOnBoundIdDeclName()
      Compatible translation of a bound identifier declaration, even if its name becomes reserved. However, as the name changes, we cannot do a simple comparison.

    • testExactTranslationOnBoundIdDeclName

      public void testExactTranslationOnBoundIdDeclName()
      Compatible translation of a bound identifier declaration when the name does not become reserved.

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnBoundIdDeclType

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnBoundIdDeclType()
      Incompatible translation due to non-translatable type of a bound identifier declaration.

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnBoundIdentType

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnBoundIdentType()
      Incompatible translation due to non-translatable type of a bound identifier.

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnAtomicExprType

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnAtomicExprType()
      Incompatible translation due to non-translatable type of an atomic expression.

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnSetExtType

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnSetExtType()
      Incompatible translation due to non-translatable type of an empty set extension.

    • testIncompatibleTranslationOnExtExprType

      public void testIncompatibleTranslationOnExtExprType()
      Incompatible translation due to non-translatable type of an extended expression.
